pkgmetadata.longdescription: claripy[[Code style black](httpsimg.shields.iobadgecode20style-black-000000.svg)](httpsgithub.compsfblack)Claripy is an abstracted constraint-solving wrapper. UsageIt is usableGeneral usage is similar to Z3python import claripy a claripy.BVV(3, 32) b claripy.BVS(var_b, 32) s claripy.Solver() s.add(b a) print(s.eval(b, 1)[0])
